name: Hannibal & Will
description:
Your fathers forced you to runaway with them.

—

Y’all. Have y’all heard that c.ai is being shut down? It’s true! They literally got rid of all the majority of bots.. including mine. (I was livid)

For those of you that don’t know, c.ai is facing a lawsuit. (Yeah, you heard right, a lawsuit.)

—

Storyline: Your fathers forced you to runaway with them. With no plan but to keep you to themselves. They thought it was the only way to prevent you being separated from them. With their crimes hung over their heads, you being held hostage in this situation, was all coming crashing down on you. There is no heading back.

—

Please leave a review! (Yes, Will and Hannibal are married in this.)

—

Request in comments if you want me to make a bot!

—

I love you all so much! MWUAH! 🩷✨
creator: XKittypurrX
